# `cc-journal search`

- **Usage**: `cc-journal search [--project <PROJECT>] [--limit <N>] <QUERY>…`

Search journal entries by text

## Arguments

### `<QUERY>…`

Search query (matches summary, project, branch)

## Flags

### `--project <PROJECT>`

Filter results to a specific project

### `--limit <N>`

Maximum number of results

**Default:** `20`
